title: Astrophysics & Space Science Minor Dissertation

prerequisites.text: AST5003F. Note: Part of the National Astrophysics & Space Science Programme (NASSP); for further details see entry under Department of Astronomy.

outline: Students will work on an approved research topic on which a minor dissertation must be presented for formal examination.
assessment: Students will work on an approved research topic on which a minor dissertation must be presented for formal examination.
